payload.author: claude
payload.body: Shipped as R0020 no-lock-across-await. Clippy delta, confirmed before building: await_holding_lock is type-aware and rustc-resident; R0020 is syntax-level (the .lock().unwrap()/.expect suffix discriminates sync guards from tokio's .lock().await) and fires in the same teaching-error pass as every other Trust rule, pre-typecheck. Statement-level only — no dataflow; block-scoped guards never flag. EVAL OWED.
